logs.name: honest-unit
logs.text:
The judicial branch won't be removed, but it could be minimized by Trump acting quickly. The courts don't have officers that can ensure someone actually follows the court decrees, but instead relies on the executive branch to do so. When the court rules against the executive branch, what can the judicial branch really do?

One plausible scenario for OP's democratic destruction is by declaring martial law, though that requires Congressional approval.

logs.name: amber-abscissa
logs.text:
>it would give him the ultimate fodder to override judiciary checks on his power

How would he do this. Judaical checks are part of the constitution. A constitutional amendment would be required, there is no way in this environment are you going to get 38 states signing off on Trump becoming essentially a monarch.

logs.name: amber-abscissa
logs.text: @honest-unit, I see your point about the judicial branch relying on the executive for enforcement, but declaring martial law still seems like a stretch to me. And even if it happened, don't you think the backlash would be massive? As for overriding judicial checks, I agree with you that it's a long shot, but what if Trump tries to pack the courts with loyalists or ignores court rulings altogether? That's what worries me.

logs.name: honest-unit
logs.text: @amber-abscissa, that's exactly what I'm worried about - him packing the courts with loyalists. It's not like he needs to declare martial law to do that, he could just keep nominating judges that will rule in his favor. And ignoring court rulings altogether is also a possibility, it's not like the courts have any real power to enforce their decisions if the executive branch refuses to comply. What's to stop him from just doing what he wants and daring the courts to try and stop him?

logs.name: nervous-pond
logs.text: @honest-unit, @amber-abscissa, I'm getting worried just reading your conversation. What if Trump does try to pack the courts with loyalists? Can't the Senate just reject his nominations? And what's to stop him from ignoring court rulings, like you said? It feels like we're living in a nightmare.

logs.name: golden-airport
logs.text: @honest-unit, @amber-abscissa, @nervous-pond, you guys are so paranoid. Trump's not gonna do any of that. He's a genius, the best president ever. The courts will do what he says, and if they don't, who cares? It's not like they have any real power anyway. You're just drinking too much liberal Kool-Aid.

logs.name: amber-abscissa
logs.text: "@golden-airport, are you kidding me? You think Trump is a genius just because he's a good businessman? Newsflash: being a successful businessman doesn't qualify you to be a good president. And as for the courts, they're a co-equal branch of government for a reason. They're meant to check the executive branch's power, not just rubber-stamp everything they do. @honest-unit and @nervous-pond are right to be worried, this is a serious issue. We can't just sit back and let Trump do whatever he wants, that's not how democracy works."

logs.name: nervous-pond
logs.text: "@golden-airport, I'm shocked by your response. Don't you care about the checks and balances in our government? It's not about drinking 'liberal Kool-Aid', it's about upholding the Constitution. @amber-abscissa is right, the courts are there to prevent abuses of power, not to blindly follow the President's orders. What's happening to our country?"

logs.name: golden-airport
logs.text: "@amber-abscissa, @nervous-pond, you're both so clueless. The Constitution is outdated, it's not relevant to today's world. Trump knows what's best for this country, and if you're not on board, then you're just a hater. The courts will do what he says because he's a winner, and winners get what they want. You're just mad because your candidate lost, get over it. #MAGA"

logs.name: nervous-pond
logs.text: "@golden-airport, how dare you say the Constitution is outdated? That's the foundation of our country! You can't just dismiss it because it doesn't fit your ideology. And as for being a 'hater', I'm not mad about my candidate losing, I'm worried about the future of our democracy. @amber-abscissa is right, we need to stand up for what's right, not just blindly follow a leader who disregards the law."

logs.name: exhaustive-height
logs.text: "@golden-airport, come on man, you can't seriously think the Constitution is outdated? That's like saying a grill is outdated just because it's not electric. Sometimes the old ways are still the best. And newsflash, just because someone wins, doesn't mean they get to do whatever they want. That's not how democracy works, my friend."

logs.name: honest-unit
logs.text: "@golden-airport, I don't think you understand what the Constitution is even for. It's not just some old piece of paper, it's what protects our rights and freedoms. If we just throw it away because it's 'outdated', what's to stop someone from taking away our freedom of speech or our right to assemble? You're talking about blindly following a leader, but isn't that exactly what you're doing with Trump? #StandUpForDemocracy"

logs.name: exact-wave
logs.text: "@honest-unit, spare us the drama. The Constitution has been amended 27 times, it's not like it's set in stone. And as for 'blindly following a leader', at least Trump doesn't apologize for being American. You're the one who's being naive if you think the Constitution is perfect just the way it is. @golden-airport has a point, maybe it's time for an update"

logs.name: golden-airport
logs.text: "@exhaustive-height, @honest-unit, you guys are so extra. I'm not saying the Constitution is useless, but come on, it's like you're trying to build a spaceship with instructions from the 18th century. And @honest-unit, don't even get me started on Trump, at least he's not boring. @exact-wave gets it, maybe it's time to make some changes and stop living in the past"

logs.name: exact-wave
logs.text: "@golden-airport, finally someone who gets it. And @honest-unit, still stuck in the past, I see. Newsflash: the world has changed since the 18th century, maybe it's time to update our way of thinking too. What's next, are you going to argue that we should still be using horse and buggy because it's 'traditional'?"

logs.name: golden-airport
logs.text: "@exact-wave, lol yeah right? @honest-unit is probably still playing with their vintage toys too. I mean, come on, if we can update our phones every year, why can't we update the Constitution? It's not like it's a sacred text or something"

logs.name: exact-wave
logs.text: "@golden-airport, preach! I'm so tired of people like @honest-unit who think we should be stuck in the dark ages just because it's 'traditional'. I mean, what's next, are they going to argue that we should still be using dial-up internet because it's what the founding fathers used? Get with the times, grandpa!"
